def: Of or pertaining to luxury; ministering to luxury; suppliedwith the conditions of luxury; as, a luxurious life; a luxurioustable; luxurious ease. " Luxurious cities. " Milton.-- Lux*u"ri*ous*ly, adv.-- Lux*u"ri*ous*ness, n.
A small marline spike having generally a wooden handle, -- usedin sailmaking. R. H. Dana, Ir.
The act of pointing out as with the finger; indication. [Obs.]Dr. H. More.
Remaining beyond the period when parts of the same kindsometimes fall off or are absorbed; permanent; as, persistent teethor gills; a persistent calyx; -- opposed to deciduous, and caducous.
To shorten the radius of (a curve); to make (a curve) sharper;as, to quicken the sheer, that is, to make its curve more pronounced.
Pertaining to the goddess Isis; as, Isiac mysteries.
One of the main bronchi in the lungs of birds.
